label: Convert design to code
description: Turn Figma designs into React components

options.label: Figma to React + Tailwind component
options.prompt: Convert the design I describe into a React component using Tailwind CSS. Match our existing design system tokens and component patterns. Include proper TypeScript props interface, responsive behavior, and accessibility attributes.

options.label: Extract design tokens
options.prompt: Extract design tokens from the design I describe — colors, spacing, typography, border radius, shadows. Output them in our existing token format (CSS variables, Tailwind config, or theme object) to match the codebase.

options.label: Component with Storybook stories
options.prompt: Create a React component from the design I describe AND generate Storybook stories for it. Include stories for: default state, all variants, edge cases (long text, empty state, loading), and interactive controls.

options.label: Full WCAG audit with fix code
options.prompt: Audit this component or page for WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility issues. For each issue found: describe the problem, cite the WCAG criterion, explain the user impact, and provide the fix code. Check: semantic HTML, ARIA, keyboard navigation, color contrast, focus management, and screen reader experience.

options.label: Keyboard navigation review
options.prompt: Review this component's keyboard navigation. Check: tab order, focus indicators, keyboard traps, shortcut conflicts, and screen reader announcements. Suggest fixes for any issues and add appropriate ARIA attributes.

options.label: Form accessibility check
options.prompt: Audit this form for accessibility. Check: label associations, error message announcements, required field indicators, input types, autocomplete attributes, and validation feedback. Generate fix code for each issue.

label: Debug performance
description: Find and fix rendering and bundle performance issues

options.label: Why is this component re-rendering?
options.prompt: Analyze this component for unnecessary re-renders. Check: missing memoization, unstable references in props/context, state that should be lifted or lowered, and expensive computations that should be memoized. Suggest specific fixes.

options.label: What's bloating the bundle?
options.prompt: Analyze the project's bundle size. Identify the largest dependencies, find unused imports, suggest code-splitting opportunities, and recommend lighter alternatives for heavy packages. Show expected size savings.

options.label: Improve Core Web Vitals
options.prompt: Analyze this page for Core Web Vitals issues. Check LCP (largest contentful paint), FID/INP (interaction delay), and CLS (layout shift). For each metric, identify the cause and suggest specific fixes with code.

label: Generate E2E tests
description: Create end-to-end tests for user flows

options.label: Test a complete user flow
options.prompt: Generate Playwright E2E tests for the user flow I describe. Include: happy path, common error cases, edge cases, and accessibility checks. Use data-testid selectors where available, and page object pattern if the flow spans multiple pages.

options.label: Visual regression tests
options.prompt: Generate visual regression tests for this component or page. Set up screenshot comparisons for: default state, hover/focus states, responsive breakpoints, and dark/light theme. Include appropriate thresholds for pixel differences.

options.label: Form validation tests
options.prompt: Generate E2E tests for this form. Cover: successful submission, each validation rule, required field enforcement, server error handling, and accessibility (tab through fields, screen reader labels). Use realistic test data.

label: Make it responsive
description: Create responsive variants and mobile layouts

options.label: Create mobile variant
options.prompt: Create a responsive mobile variant of this component. Adapt the layout for small screens (< 640px): stack horizontal layouts vertically, adjust font sizes, handle touch targets (min 44px), and hide non-essential elements. Use Tailwind responsive prefixes.

options.label: Add all breakpoint variants
options.prompt: Add responsive behavior for all standard breakpoints (mobile, tablet, desktop, wide). Show the layout changes at each breakpoint and use container queries where they make more sense than media queries.

options.label: Fix layout overflow issues
options.prompt: Debug responsive layout issues in this component. Check for: horizontal overflow, text truncation problems, image scaling, flexbox/grid issues at narrow widths, and missing min/max constraints. Fix each issue.
